description: Black and grey backpackOne haul loop on top, two padded and adjustable shoulder strapsThree main zip compartments, the front compartment has two organiser sleeves, one zipped mesh pocket, three pen holders and an earphone outlet insideTwo mesh stash pockets on the sides with elasticated rimsPadded back, straps with click clasps at the waistWarranty: 5-year warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defectsDisclaimer: Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shown.Note: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the image
